NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SOURCEWATERDROPLET.d: A unique resource consumed by certain cards.
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SURGE.title: Surge
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SURGE.description: Heal for the listed amount, then lose that much HP at the end of combat, but never below 50% of Max HP.
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SUBMIT.title: Submit
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_SUBMIT.description: Exhaust the chosen card and gain Oratrice based on its resolved cost.
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_AGILITY.title: Agility
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_AGILITY.description: The next time you play a Skill that gains Block, it gains additional Block equal to this amount, then lose that much Agility.
NEUVILLETTE_KEYWORD_MELUSINESTICKER.desc: A special sticker card used by Melusine-related effects.
